last_30d.note: 30d clicks UNCHANGED at 7 vs both 2026-05-05 and 2026-05-06 check-ins. Third consecutive day flat. Phase 2 retrofit (live Pinterest pin URL edits to point at Amazon idea-lists) only 2/114 done; rate-limited to 2-3 edits/session. Image-rich Editor's Picks linktree pages live as of 2026-05-06 with ascsubtag attribution on all 153 Amazon links — too soon to read attribution but the LLD A/B test (lld_a_amzdirect vs lld_b_linktree) decision deadline is 2026-05-20.

delta_vs_prior_check: FLAT - 0 click delta vs 2026-05-06. No new clicks in 24h. The 30d window keeps rolling forward; the mid-April spike has not yet fallen out so 30d still reads 7. Once it falls out the 30d count drops while lifetime stays at 7 — that's the signal we're back to baseline 0/day until pin retrofits or new content move the needle.

ab_test_status.note: 2 of 22 Group A LLD pins live on Amazon URL. Group A pins still need ascsubtag=lld_a_amzdirect appended; current URL is bare Amazon idea-list.
